title: Kiece - Cobblemon Minimap Icons
description: Nearly complete selection of Pokémon Shuffle's Style icons for Xaero's Minimap for use in Cobblemon
body:
## Cobblemon icons for Xaero's Minimap in Pokémon Shuffle style

Adds Pokémon Shuffle style icons for Cobblemon entities in Xaero's Minimap mod.

**Contains almost all Pokémon, including a mark for shinies.**


_Requires Xaero's Minimap and Cobblemon to work. Entities should be enabled with icons displayed in the Minimap's settings._


Still missing Variants (Regional, Gender, Forms...) and new Hisuian Pokémon.

Contains Tatsugiri.
